# BrownSugar Café

> BrownSugar is a dessert and coffee café by Master Chef Devaki, serving handcrafted coffee, tea, momos, burgers, sandwiches and signature desserts. Guests browse a live menu and place dine-in orders by scanning the QR code at their table.

## Pages

- [Live Menu](/): Full café menu with categories, vegetarian filters and live availability.
